g.title: Hidden states from encoder Used as Key and Value in cross-attention
Lower triangular mask Prevents attending to future tokens
Padding mask for encoder output Prevents attending to padding tokens
Input tensor: (batch, seq_len, d_model) Either from embedding layer or previous decoder layer
Output tensor: (batch, seq_len, d_model) Passed to next decoder layer or final projection

text.tspan: Adv: Stable training, better gradient flow

g.title: Pre-normalization Learnable scale γ and shift β μ = mean(x), σ = std(x) output = γ · (x-μ)/σ + β
Q, K, V all from normalized input Scaled dot-product attention Applied causal mask num_heads parallel attention heads
Residual connection Adds original input to sublayer output
Pre-normalization before cross-attention
Q from decoder, K and V from encoder Enables attending to encoder representations Each head learns different alignments
Residual connection Adds input to cross-attention output
Pre-normalization before FFN
Two linear transformations with ReLU FFN(x) = max(0, xW₁ + b₁)W₂ + b₂ d_ff typically = 4 × d_model
Final residual connection Adds input to FFN output
